---
title: "Lab 2a: Measuring Distance and Access"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · ArcGIS Online track · Day 2"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab02a_DistanceAccess_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab02a_DistanceAccess_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab02a_Projections_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab02a_Projections_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab2a-online.md >}}
